text:
Reported by: Piotr Kubaj <pkubaj anongoth pl>
Submitted by: Nathan <ndowens yahoo com>

Please confirm QA, on powerpc64, and in particular no regressions on !powerpc64

If there are upstream references (bug reports, pull requests, commits), please add them as references/links in a comment in the patch header
